name: mathzero-generation
description: Generate diverse math problems with verifiable solutions for training math-capable models
content:
## MathZero

### Core Concept

Generate diverse math problems with verifiable solutions for training math-capable models

### Implementation

Key implementation aspects:
1. Data preparation and preprocessing
2. Model architecture design
3. Training procedure
4. Evaluation and validation

This skill enables Generate diverse math problems with verifiable solutions for training math-capable models.

### When to Use

- Problem domain matches technique scope
- Required computational resources available
- Evaluation criteria well-defined

### When NOT to Use

- Limited data availability
- Tight latency requirements
- Domain significantly different
